# Universal Mail Automation

> Multi-provider email triage with provable restraint: a fail-closed protected-sender gate (never archives government, financial, legal, or platform mail) plus an independent, signed audit receipt that refuses to report success if a protected sender left the inbox.

## For agents
- MCP tools (Streamable HTTP): https://mail.example.com/mcp ; stdio: python -m mcp_server
- Agentic Commerce checkout: https://mail.example.com/acp/checkout_sessions
- Product feed: https://mail.example.com/acp/feed.json
- Receipt verification: https://mail.example.com/v1/audit/{run_id}

## API
- Pricing: https://mail.example.com/v1/billing/plans
- Protected-sender check (no mailbox): https://mail.example.com/v1/senders/check
- Account key verification: https://mail.example.com/v1/auth/verify
- Triage preview (dry-run, account key required): https://mail.example.com/v1/triage/preview
